creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Bradley T. Hughes from comment #11)

I like your flavors suggestion.

However, most of my flavors suggestions were rejected, because the portmgr@ has the final say when they can or can't be used. For ex., flavors in the finance/dash port have been rejected: https://reviews.freebsd.org/D13566

Cheers,
Yuri
